name: The Codex
description: Transform your new tab into a personalized dashboard with smart icons, multiple themes, and advanced sync.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://selfh.st https://www.google.com; connect-src 'self';
